summary: EXP-198 written. Preemptive paragraph closes the transverse-mode escape via three compounding arguments: (i) dome is on record using quarter-wave via WIN-029 and model-page line 64 — retreat requires simultaneous WIN-029 withdrawal; (ii) transverse-mode formula requires globe circumference, which disc diameter replicates by AE-projection construction (40,030 km = 2πR_Earth to 4 sig figs); (iii) dome's monotonically varying H(r) violates the transverse-mode uniform-shell boundary condition. Insertion-only patch — no existing paragraphs modified. Recommend decider integrate the new paragraph into data/wins.json WIN-038.detail_evidence at the specified insertion point and then close ISS-1271.
